rulings.Case Title: KELLY KIMBALL VS. ANNE KIHAGI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff Kelly Kimbal'S Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Plaintiffs For Leave To Conduct Financial Discovery On Defendants
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 27, 2017 line 1. Plaintiff Kelly Kimbal'S Motion For Leave To Conduct Financial Discovery On Defendants Continued to January 16, 2018 to be heard with the Judgment on the Pleadings in Department 302 at 9:30 a.m. Plaintiff to be ready to serve discovery personally on January 16, 2018 if motion for Leave to Conduct Financial Discovery is Granted. If motion to conduct financial discovery is granted Defendant's responses will be due by hand-delivery no later than January 26, 2018. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: MARION L STARR VS. AGNES C KOSEL ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 27, 2017 line 2. DEFENDANT AGNES KOZEL's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts re: unpermitted hostile use of the easement outside of the scope of the express easement and without permission (key) of defendant. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: REDWOOD PROPERTY INVESTORS II, LLC VS. ALBERT LEONG ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 27, 2017 line 3. DEFENDANTs ALBERT LEONG, LINDA LEONG, JASON LEONG and RICHARD LEONG's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer under CCP 1161a. Defendants improperly raise issues of fact. Plaintiff's factual allegations must be taken as true. Plaintiff's untimely opposition is stricken. = (501/LOT)
